text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
My friend bought too many mochi balls yesterday
and she couldn't finish them all herself, so she
gave me some just before bedtime...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
But the thing is, their expiration date was eleven
o'clock last night!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I was going to have them for breakfast this
morning, so I just went to sleep without checking
the packaging...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Aaah! I can't believe I let good food go to
waste... I'm going to spend the whole day thinking
about what I've done! I'm sorryyyyy!
